A0100A_NPI_NUM A0100A Facility National Provider Identifier (NPI) CHAR 10 This column contains the facility or provider's National Provider Identifier number.
41 A0100B_CMS_CRTFCTN_NUM A0100B_CMS_CRTFCTN_NUM A0100B Facility CMS Certification Number (CCN) CHAR 12 This column contains the facility or provider's CMS Certification (Medicare) Number.
42 A0100C_STATE_PRVDR_NUM A0100C_STATE_PRVDR_NUM A0100C State Provider Number CHAR 15 This column contains the facility or provider's state-assigned
